notes: Default Ex-1 producer examples for SDK contract roundtrip tests.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-a
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-1 producer payload using placeholder subsystem data.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-b
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-1 producer payload with a second placeholder timestamp.

invalid_examples.name: ingest-submitted-at-leak
invalid_examples.notes: Ingest metadata guard: submitted_at is owned by ingest and must not appear in producer payloads.

invalid_examples.name: missing-produced-at
invalid_examples.notes: Producer-owned required field guard: Ex-1 requires produced_at.

invalid_examples.name: unknown-ex-type
invalid_examples.notes: Unknown Ex type guard: Ex-9 is not a supported producer payload type.

invalid_examples.name: missing-ex-type
invalid_examples.notes: Producer-owned required field guard: produced payloads must declare ex_type.

invalid_examples.name: wrong-ex-type-for-produced-shape
invalid_examples.notes: Ex type mismatch guard: produced_at payloads must not be declared as Ex-0.
